overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from a cinematic action game showing a warrior character running through a desolate coastal landscape. The character traverses rocky terrain, passes abandoned wooden totems and ruins, explores a dilapidated structure, and runs along foggy cliff edges overlooking the ocean.

scene_state.functional_zone: desolate rocky coastal path with distant mountains

agents.ego_description: running steadily through open rocky terrain toward distant ruins on the horizon

entered.detail: dark volcanic rock ground with scattered stones and patches of grass
hazy mountain silhouettes against the overcast sky
large dark boulders flanking the path

segments.scene_description: The character runs through a wide-open desolate landscape of dark volcanic rock. Distant mountains loom under an overcast sky while scattered rock formations line the path. The atmosphere is bleak and misty with cool blue-grey tones.

scene_state.functional_zone: foggy coastal ruins with wooden totem poles

events.description: entering area with wooden ruins and totem poles emerging from the fog
fog density increases significantly, reducing visibility of distant objects

agents.ego_description: running through the foggy ruins, navigating around wooden totem poles and dilapidated structures

entered.detail: tall carved wooden pole with tribal markings
collapsed thatched-roof structure with broken beams
vertical wooden stakes marking a boundary

segments.scene_description: The character moves into a foggy area filled with abandoned wooden structures. Totem poles and ruined huts emerge from the mist as visibility decreases. The ground transitions to a dirt trail winding through the coastal ruins.

events.description: reaching the cliff edge with a dramatic view of the foggy ocean below
dense fog rolls in from the ocean, obscuring the horizon

agents.ego_description: running along the narrow cliff edge path overlooking the foggy coastline

entered.detail: steep drop-off to the ocean shrouded in thick fog
vast body of water barely visible through dense mist
prominent carved wooden pillar standing near the cliff edge

segments.scene_description: The character runs along a perilous cliff edge with the foggy ocean visible far below. A tall totem pole stands sentinel near the precipice as mist rolls in from the sea. The atmosphere is tense and atmospheric with limited visibility.

events.description: entering the dark wooden ruin structure with broken roof
exiting the wooden structure back to the open coastal path

agents.ego_description: entering the wooden ruin, moving through the interior past cages and barrels, then exiting to continue along the cliff path

entered.detail: large cylindrical cage made of wooden bars containing a skull
old wooden barrel lying on its side
damaged thatched roof with gaps showing the sky
stacked stone barrier inside the structure

segments.scene_description: The character enters a dilapidated wooden ruin containing cages, barrels, and stone walls. After passing through the dark interior with its broken roof, the character exits back to the open rocky terrain, continuing toward distant structures along the foggy coast.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a bleak volcanic wasteland that gradually transitions into a series of foggy coastal ruins. It begins with the character running across a wide expanse of dark volcanic rock under an overcast sky, where cool blue-grey tones dominate the misty landscape. As the character moves forward, the open terrain shifts into a winding dirt trail where abandoned wooden huts and totem poles emerge from a thickening fog. The path then leads along a perilous cliff edge overlooking a distant, misty ocean before turning inward toward a dilapidated wooden ruin filled with cages and barrels. Finally, the camera follows the character through the dark, broken interior and back out into the open rocky terrain, heading toward distant structures along the foggy coast.
